task.title: US-001: Introduce a cohesive visual theme and layout rhythm
task.description:
As a user, I want the TUI to feel cohesive and intentional, with consistent borders, emphasis, and spacing. The layout should align panel titles, section spacing, and table header styling for quick scanning.

### Impact Table
| Path | Change | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| src/cli/tui/ui.rs | modify | Centralize styles and apply consistent layout styling | |
| src/cli/tui/mod.rs | modify | Expose new theme helpers if split into module | Optional: new module re-export |
| src/cli/tui/theme.rs | create | Reusable TUI styles and color palette | Optional file if needed |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Define a small set of reusable styles (title, panel, dim text, accent, selection).
- [ ] Apply the styles consistently to title bar, panels, and table header.
- [ ] Improve panel separation and padding to make the layout feel less cramped.
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- [ ] cargo test passes
- [ ] Run the TUI locally: cargo run -- tui

impactTable.purpose: Centralize styles and apply consistent layout styling
Expose new theme helpers if split into module
Reusable TUI styles and color palette

commitMetadata.message: LinGet-2sc.1: LinGet-2sc.1 - US-001: Introduce a cohesive visual theme and layout rhythm
commitMetadata.fullMessage:
LinGet-2sc.1: LinGet-2sc.1 - US-001: Introduce a cohesive visual theme and layout rhythm

- Created src/cli/tui/theme.rs with centralized style definitions
- Added palette submodule with RGB color constants
- Defined 20+ reusable style functions for consistent TUI styling
- Applied styles to title bar, panels, table headers, and status bar
- Improved panel separation (sources panel: 20→22 chars)

Ralph-Task: LinGet-2sc.1
